next_experiment: Stop polishing the fixed endpoint constant and prove signed pointwise minor-arc cancellation at K=56.
claim_boundary: No conjecture proof and no certified conjecture counterexample.
proof_boundary: The theorem proves route optimality only. It neither proves the K=56 pointwise residual estimate nor rules out K=57 after raising the finite cutoff or using N-dependent singular-series structure. Strong Goldbach remains open.
